caption: In an indoor setting featuring a blue wall and a red curtain, a crowd of people gathers around a man wearing a white bathrobe over a white shirt and a grey tie. In the initial sequence, the man stands calmly while several people behind him, including a man with a brown mustache in a green shirt, cheer and raise their fists in excitement. As the scene progresses, the man in the bathrobe remains still, maintaining a neutral expression while the surrounding crowd continues to celebrate. The perspective then shifts to a wider shot, revealing more of the environment, including a decorative blue and white border along the top of the wall. In this new angle, a man with a blue suit and a distinctive bald head with purple hair on the sides is seen talking to the man in the bathrobe, while a woman with red hair looks on from the left.
